name: Ben Carson
subject: An amazing milestone
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27745272:26676571703:m:1:876315805:213A757D6A13A31BC7A3DCE490D9094E:r)
---
|

Peter, I've got an exciting update that I wanted to briefly share with you.

Carson America is just about to cross 100,000 donations.

[**That is an amazing milestone, and I'd like to ask you to help get us over the line by making a contribution today.
|
---
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27745272:26676571703:m:1:876315805:213A757D6A13A31BC7A3DCE490D9094E:r)Over the past week, I've been traveling around, meeting with voters in early voting states and sharing my message.

I've talked about my desire for a simple, fair and proportional flat tax that dramatically reduces the power of agencies like the IRS.

I've talked about my strong belief that marriage is between one man and one woman, and how activist judges are not above the Constitution.

I've talked about developing our abundant energy resources so that energy prices remain low, we grow our economy, and we strengthen our hand on the world stage.

Everywhere I go, these ideas are resonating, and they are helping to fuel the momentum that we are seeing every day of this campaign.

[**Please help us to take our next big step forward by crossing 100,000 donations.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27745272:26676571703:m:1:876315805:213A757D6A13A31BC7A3DCE490D9094E:r)

You can also help by asking your friends to sign up at [www.BenCarson.com](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27745273:26676571703:m:1:876315805:213A757D6A13A31BC7A3DCE490D9094E:r), so that they can get involved as well.

Thank you for your continued participation and support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27745272:26676571703:m:1:876315805:213A757D6A13A31BC7A3DCE490D9094E:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27745274:26676571703:m:1:876315805:213A757D6A13A31BC7A3DCE490D9094E:r)
---
|
---

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: re: If I run -- I will run to win
body:
Friend, did you see the email I sent yesterday? **[Can you help?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27747446:26678914836:m:1:877327319:436153C991AF82D297B3EBBFF2F0C6E4:r)**

Thanks so much.

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

I recently established a "testing the waters" committee called **Security Through Strength** to fund my travels around the country so I can listen to Americans and gauge support for a potential presidential campaign.

Today, Friend, as one of my key supporters, I am turning to you for help. Before I make my final decision about a White House run, I need to know that you are with me.

To that end, **[I am asking you to please make a generous contribution to Security Through Strength today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27747446:26678914836:m:1:877327319:436153C991AF82D297B3EBBFF2F0C6E4:r)**.

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. In today's perilous world, **we must keep our country secure and protect the American Dream**. We owe it to our children and grandchildren to do no less.

Friend, if I decide to run for the Republican nomination for President, **I will run to win**. Today, I am asking you to support my "testing the waters" activities as I explore a potential candidacy. I hope you will stand with me in this important effort **[by making a contribution of $25, $50 $100, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27747446:26678914836:m:1:877327319:436153C991AF82D297B3EBBFF2F0C6E4:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27747446:26678914836:m:1:877327319:436153C991AF82D297B3EBBFF2F0C6E4:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isrdg8v1dN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osrdg8v1dN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osrdg8v1dN)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: How should we lead?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42029224:17034367053:m:1:1349778030:2805186D302A030B23321831DED68CBD:r)
---
Peter, Earlier today, in New York City, I delivered a major policy address detailing my foreign policy vision for American leadership in the 21st Century. In order for this to be A New American Century, we need a president who will answer the question "how should we lead?" with clarity and consistency. I intend to be such a president. My foreign policy doctrine consists of three pillars: 1\. American strength
2\. The protection of the American economy in a globalized world
3\. Moral clarity regarding America's core values
**[_Click here to watch the full speech with Q &A moderated by Charlie Rose: _](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42029225:17034367053:m:1:1349778030:2805186D302A030B23321831DED68CBD:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42029225:17034367053:m:1:1349778030:2805186D302A030B23321831DED68CBD:r) Of all the important duties of the presidency, and there are many, protecting our people and their interests - wherever those interests lie - is the highest honor, the greatest burden, and the most profound privilege. The first duty of the president, as written in the Constitution, is not "taxer in chief" or "regulator in chief" - it is Commander in Chief. Only American leadership will bring safety and enduring peace. America led valiantly in the last century - from Truman to Kennedy to Reagan. And because of our leadership, that century became an American Century. With your support, I will lead us into another American Century. Thank you, Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42029226:17034367053:m:1:1349778030:2805186D302A030B23321831DED68CBD:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42029227:17034367053:m:1:1349778030:2805186D302A030B23321831DED68CBD:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42029228:17034367053:m:1:1349778030:2805186D302A030B23321831DED68CBD:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Goldman Sachs
body:
#
Dear Friend,
It's time to break up the banks.

The greed, recklessness, and illegal behavior on Wall Street drove this country into the worst recession since the Great Depression. Their casino-style gambling has helped divert 99 percent of all new income to the top one percent. And it has contributed to the most unequal level of wealth and income distribution of any major country on earth.

In the midst of all of this grotesque inequality sits a handful of financial institutions that are still so large, the failure of any one would cause catastrophic risk to millions of Americans and send the world economy into crisis.

**If it's too big to fail, it's too big to exist. That's the bottom line. **

I introduced legislation in Congress that would break up banks that are too big to fail.**Can you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my bill to show your support?**

[**Click here to add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my bill to break up the banks.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2120/43f17890/5e238c38/621dfda2/3666269051/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/break-up-banks?source=em150513d")

**Banking should be boring.** It shouldn't be about making as much profit as possible by gambling on esoteric financial products. The goal of banking should be to provide affordable loans to small and medium-sized businesses in the productive economy, and to Americans who need to purchase homes and cars.

That is not what these financial institutions are doing. They're instead creating an economy which is not sustainable from a moral, economic, or political perspective. **It's a rigged economy that must be changed in fundamental ways. **

Let's be clear who we're talking about: JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, and other institutions; they're all too big to fail. So they must be broken up.

Wall Street can't be an island unto itself separate from the rest of the productive economy whose only goal is to make as much money as possible. I fear very much that the financial system is even more fragile than many people may perceive.

Millions of Americans are working longer hours for lower wages, while virtually all new income goes to the people who need it the least. In fact, the top 14 wealthiest people saw their wealth grow more last year than the bottom 130 million have in total.

**We must break this cycle to save the middle class in America. Can you show your support for my bill to break up the banks?**

**[Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor to my legislation to break up banks that are too big to fail.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2120/43f17890/5e238c38/621dfda3/3666269051/VEsE/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/break-up-banks?source=em150513d")**

I'm running for President of the United States because I believe that it is incumbent on us to try to take back our country from the billionaires and make it thrive again for the working and middle class. Breaking up the banks is a critical part to making that a reality.

Thank you for all of your support.

Senator Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2120/43f17890/5e238c38/621dfda0/3666269051/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150513bpD")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2120/43f17890/5e238c38/621dfda1/3666269051/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/unsubscribe"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2120/43f17890/5e238c38/621dfdae/3666269051/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 📩PETITION: Denounce Boehner 📩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Tea Party House Republicans JUST voted in favor of a national 20-week abortion ban.Friend -- Tea Party House Republicans JUST voted in favor of a national 20-week abortion ban. Speaker Boehner and his Tea Party majority should be ashamed. This bill is an unacceptable intrusion by the government into the private lives of its citizens. And it would undermine the Supreme Court's landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision. In short, this bill severely restricts a woman's right to choose. This right has been under continual assault by extreme Republicans for decades, and we should not be passive in its defense. **Speaker Boehner needs to hear from us that today 's attack on women's rights is NOT ok.** **[Will you join me in denouncing Speaker Boehner for passing this disastrous bill?](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2799/738133e4/39a043e3/7f9bad94/679708506/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/pro-choice?sc=ema_2015-05-13_b2_pm_pro-choice_ldnd")** Thanks, Patrick Murphy | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-may2015?refcode=ema_2015-05-13_b2_pm_pro-choice_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
